recommendations.title: Metro

recommendations.title: The Anomaly
recommendations.overview: A former soldier is taken captive and awakens in the back of a van where he learns that he only has less than 10 minutes to figure out how he got there.

recommendations.title: Adulthood
recommendations.overview: After serving six years for killing his schoolmate, a young man learns that someone is out for revenge.

recommendations.title: The Kiss in the Tunnel

recommendations.title: The Tunnel to Summer, the Exit of Goodbyes
recommendations.genres: Animation, Drama, Romance, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Urashima Tunnel – Once you enter that tunnel, you can get whatever you want, but at a price. Kaoru Tohno, who seems to have an elusive personality and traumatic past, and Anzu Hanashiro, who is struggling to reconcile her ideal image and true-to-hear

recommendations.title: Cloudy Mountain
recommendations.overview: The opening of the new tunnel, which took ten years to build, coincided with a series of serious cataclysms. The lives of 160,000 people depend on the actions of two people, a father and a son.

recommendations.title: Breathe
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of Robin, a handsome, brilliant and adventurous man whose life takes a dramatic turn when polio leaves him paralyzed.

recommendations.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
recommendations.overview: After finding a host body in investigative reporter Eddie Brock, the alien symbiote must face a new enemy, Carnage, the alter ego of serial killer Cletus Kasady.

recommendations.title: Pacto de Fuga
recommendations.overview: During the last years of Pinochet's military regime,  a group of militants from the "Manuel Rodríguez Patriotic Front" plan a prison break of political prisoners, through a tunnel that will take them 18 months to dig.

recommendations.title: Kill
